text: Which symbol ends a Java statement?
How does System.out.println differ from System.out.print in Java output?
answer: println outputs a newline after printing; print does not.
a: println outputs without quotes, print outputs with quotes.
b: println outputs a newline after printing; print does not.
c: println prints variables only; print prints text only.
d: println needs parentheses; print does not.
